settings.supporting_copy: Bitcoin moves in waves—through art, code, people, projects, and ideas. Explore the cultural signals shaping the same ocean.
settings.visual_caption: An abstract atlas of macro swell, technical ripples, and cultural currents moving through Bitcoin.
settings.editorial_heading: Stories moving through the Bitcoin ocean.
settings.editorial_copy: Upcoming MSC essays, interviews, explainers, and field notes will chart the ideas gathering momentum across Bitcoin culture.
settings.discovery_heading: Artists, builders, companies, and projects shaping the next wave.
settings.discovery_copy: Upcoming MSC profiles will collect verified context on the people, companies, and projects shaping Bitcoin culture.
settings.reports_copy: Upcoming MSC reports will turn verified network observations into clear monthly context without inventing live data.
